user_question: ông sùng văn thái ở huyện Đăk Glong có bao nhiêu thành viên trong gia đình năm 2024

query_plan.original_question: Năm 2024, hộ gia đình có chủ hộ tên Sùng Văn Thái tại Huyện Đăk Glong có bao nhiêu thành viên

sql: SELECT households."family.hostName" AS host_name, households."family.code" AS household_id, households."administrative.district" AS district, households."administrative.commune" AS commune, COUNT(*) AS household_member_count FROM members INNER JOIN households ON members."family.code" = households."family.code" AND members."administrative.year" = households."administrative.year" AND members."administrative.district" = households."administrative.district" AND members."administrative.commune" = households."administrative.commune" WHERE households."administrative.year" = 2024 AND LOWER(households."family.hostName") = 'sùng văn thái' AND LOWER(households."administrative.district") = 'huyện đăk glong' GROUP BY host_name, household_id, district, commune
